title: Don't Stop Me Now
meaning_summary: Don’t Stop Me Now keeps earning because it is one of Queen’s most reusable feel-good records, with strong playlist, film, ad, and event value.
revenue_drivers: High-energy classic-rock playlists keep the song in daily circulation.
Advertising, film, and event contexts make the track unusually reusable.
Queen catalog demand links the song to a broader set of evergreen hits.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models classic-rock streaming, sync friendliness, event use, and writer-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label catalog master with band/estate royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears valuable because of Queen writer-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a disclosed royalty statement.
